offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, poor inventory visibility causes stockouts. We provide restock notifications instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inability to monitor inventory levels effectively, leading to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory issues
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users test threshold settings and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
